cldr: face with open eyes and hand over mouth
keywords: face with open eyes and hand over mouth
tts: face with open eyes and hand over mouth

comments: This is the 1st version of grinning squinting face. It has 72 frames.
This is used for (xd) and (laugh) in Skype/Teams configs. (xd) in Skype currently uses old 72 frames set. (laugh) in Teams uses new 51 frames set.
New set of images for laugh (51 frames) is in this repository ../skype-unique/laugh
